targets.$comment: Baselines captured 2026-04-14 on i9-13900KS (Windows) via --job short. Targets apply ~3x headroom on mean and ~1.5x on allocated bytes to absorb ubuntu-latest runner slowdown. Revisit after first CI run.

stabilityOverrides.$comment: Keys are matched as 'ClassName.Method' or 'ClassName.Method(Params)'. Matching entries are excluded from the stable/unstable headline ratio and from regression detection.
stabilityOverrides.MemoryCacheProviderBenchmarks.SetWithSli: Timer-backed sliding expiration introduces real scheduler noise; CoV ~13% at N=20 does not settle with more iterations.
stabilityOverrides.MemoryCacheProviderBenchmarks.SetAsync: MemoryCache write path is bimodal on BDN MultimodalDistribution detector; CoV ~14% at N=20 is inherent to allocation pressure on shared CI runner.
stabilityOverrides.MemoryCacheProviderBenchmarks.GetOrSetAs: Factory-invocation + cache population is bimodal (BDN MultimodalDistribution); CoV ~14% at N=20 does not stabilize.
